overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a picturesque countryside at golden hour. The character travels past stone windmills, along a riverbank, through shallow water, and into flowering meadows with snow-capped mountains in the distance.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a dirt path through tall grass, approaching and passing large stone windmills with wooden sails

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone tower with conical roof and wooden sails
narrow dirt trail winding through grassy countryside
simple wooden post fence lining the left side of the path
colorful red and purple wildflowers growing in the grass
snow-capped mountain peak visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on horseback along a dirt path through a sunlit countryside. Large stone windmills with wooden sails dominate the landscape ahead, while colorful wildflowers line the path. The warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the trail as the horse moves steadily forward.

events.description: horse transitions from dirt path onto sandy riverbank and enters shallow water

agents.ego_description: riding along the sandy riverbank beside calm water, approaching the water's edge to enter the stream

entered.detail: calm blue river with gentle current and clear shallow edges
sandy riverbank at the water's edge transitioning into the stream

segments.scene_description: The rider leaves the dirt path and approaches the river, transitioning onto a sandy shore. The stone windmills recede behind as the horse enters the shallow water, creating small splashes. The river stretches out ahead with the distant mountains still visible across the water.

events.description: horse turns while wading through the shallow river, changing direction toward the far bank

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water, creating splashes as the horse moves through the stream and turns toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: stone windmill visible on the distant left hillside across the river

segments.scene_description: The horse wades through the clear, shallow river water with the sandy bottom visible beneath. The camera turns to reveal the windmills now visible on the distant left shore. The water ripples around the horse's legs as it moves steadily across the river toward the far bank.

events.description: horse exits the water and climbs onto the grassy riverbank

agents.ego_description: riding up the grassy bank from the river and galloping through a lush meadow filled with wildflowers and scattered trees

entered.detail: lush green grass with scattered red and purple wildflowers
mature green oak trees providing shade in the meadow

segments.scene_description: The horse climbs out of the water onto a grassy bank and enters a lush meadow filled with wildflowers. Large trees dot the landscape as the rider continues through the tall grass. The warm sunlight illuminates the vibrant green countryside as the journey continues away from the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit countryside path through a shallow river and into a lush, flowering meadow. It begins by following a rider on horseback along a dirt trail lined with wildflowers, moving toward large stone windmills under the warm glow of golden hour. As the rider leaves the path, the scene shifts toward a sandy shore where the horse enters the river, creating small splashes as the windmills recede into the distance. The camera then tracks the horse wading through clear, shallow water with a visible sandy bottom before turning to reveal the distant shoreline. Finally, the horse climbs onto a grassy bank and moves into a vibrant meadow filled with tall grass and scattered trees under the illuminating sunlight.
